subject: Unbinned tomogram dimensions in Reconstruct tomograms
body:
I found a difference between Warp and IMOD reconstruction. If I used 
0.675/0.675A, bin1,4000*4000*3000 in Warp. The resultof size was half of 
IMOD reconstruction. And I tried 8000*8000*6000, it had a right size. 
Maybe, does the "Unbinned" mean the super resolution?
